data.title: Scott Bessent Says 'We Will Follow The Money' As US Sanctions $344M From Iran-Linked Crypto Wallets
data.description: The US Treasury has imposed sanctions on numerous cryptocurrency wallets connected to Iran, following the freezing of approximately $344 million in Tether (USDT) by stablecoin issuer Tether. The frozen funds were associated with a network linked to Iran, with two Tron (TRX) addresses holding $213 million and $131 million each being affected by the freeze. This coordinated effort involved the Office of Foreign Assets Control and US law enforcement. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent stated the intention to track the funds Tehran is trying to move out of the country. These actions are part of Iran's trend of utilizing cryptocurrency to avoid sanctions. Since mid-March, Iran has been utilizing crypto channels to evade financial restrictions.

data.title: THREE KIA MODELS WIN U.S. NEWS & WORLD REPORT'S 2026 "BEST HYBRID AND ELECTRIC CAR" AWARDS
data.description: The Telluride HEV has been distinguished as the top Midsize Hybrid SUV for 2027, while the Niro HEV was recognized as the Best Subcompact Hybrid SUV for 2026. Additionally, the Sportage PHEV was awarded the title of Best Compact Plug-in Hybrid SUV for the same year. These accolades were announced by U.S. News & World Report in Irvine, Calif., on April 24, 2026. Kia had three of its vehicles acknowledged in the publication's "Best Hybrid and..." list.

data.title: Orkes Raises $60M as Developers Increasingly Use Its Platform to Deploy AI Confidently in Production
data.description: A tech company based in Santa Clara, California, named Orkes has secured $60 million in a recent funding round. Orkes, known for its agents and durable workflow orchestration platform developed by the same architects behind Netflix's microservices orchestration platform, is experiencing a surge in adoption by developers working on AI applications for deployment. AVP spearheaded the Series B investment in Orkes, with additional funding from new backer Prosperity7 Ventures, as well as continued support from existing investors Nexus Venture Partners and Battery Ventures.

data.title: EFG Companies Wins Silver American Business Award for Delivering More Revenue to Powersports Dealers
data.description: In Dallas, EFG Companies received a Silver American Business Award for Achievement in Product Innovation in the 24th annual Stevie Award competition.

data.title: Hormel Foods Completes Sale of Whole-Bird Turkey Business to Life-Science Innovations
data.description: A Fortune 500 global branded food company, Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE: HRL), has confirmed the retention of the JENNIE-O® brand and value-added turkey product portfolio. data.title: Media Contributor Kianga Moore to Host Executive Media Roundtable On AI's Transformational Impact in Retail
data.description: Top executives from AdFury.ai, Vendormint, and New Nexus Group will be delving into the realms of real-time decision-making, resilience, and growth amidst a volatile market. Scheduled for discussion in New York on April 24, 2026, the leaders aim to address the challenges faced by retailers in light of persistent economic instability, supply chain disruptions, and rapidly changing consumer behaviors. This forum will seek innovative solutions to capitalize on opportunities and mitigate risks within the market dynamics. Stay tuned for insights from this high-level discussion shaping the future of retail in the face of uncertainty and change.

data.title: Youlife Group Inc. Reschedules FY2025 Earnings Conference Call to April 28 at 9 AM ET
data.description: China-based company Youlife Group Inc. (NASDAQ: YOUL), a prominent provider of lifetime services for blue-collar workers, has postponed its full year 2025 earnings conference call to be held on April 28th, 2026. This rescheduling was announced on April 24th, 2026.

data.title: Anthropic enhances election security for Claude AI with 95-96% neutrality score in tests for 2026 US midterms.
data.description: Anthropic, the maker of Claude, recently announced that their newest AI models achieved an impressive political neutrality score of 95-96% in preparation for the upcoming 2026 midterm elections.

data.title: The Sterling Group Foundation Fund Acquires Scruggs, a Provider of Municipal Water Infrastructure Solutions
data.description: In a recent announcement on April 24, 2026, the Foundation Fund by The Sterling Group acquired The Scruggs Companies, a company that offers essential products and services. The Foundation Fund is a private equity firm that focuses on the operational aspects of lower middle market businesses. This acquisition marks a significant move in the industry, with precise figures on the transaction amount not disclosed. The Sterling Group continues to expand its portfolio and strengthen its presence in the market through strategic acquisitions and investments.
Brent Crude futures settle at $105.33/bbl, up 26 cents, 0.25%.

data.title: CYPRESS GROVE BRINGS AWARD-WINNING SPECIALTY CHEESE TO TARGET
data.description: Iconic Northern California creamery, Cypress Grove, famous for Humboldt Fog®, is now offering fan-favorite goat cheeses in over 450 Target stores across the country. The American artisanal cheese pioneer unveiled this exciting news on April 24, 2026.

data.title: The Chip Stock Rally That Broke History: SOXX Notches Record 17-Day Win Streak
data.description: The Philadelphia Semiconductor Index has made history by achieving 17 consecutive green trading sessions, surpassing its previous record of 15 set in 2014. During this period, the SOX has seen a remarkable 42% surge, marking its largest monthly gain since the dot-com boom of February 2000. Additionally, the Semiconductor ETFs are experiencing unprecedented success, with the iShares Semiconductor ETF (NASDAQ: SOXX) recording a more than 30% increase in April, its best month in the fund's 25-year history. The VanEck Semiconductor ETF (SMH) has also seen significant growth, rising over 25%, its strongest monthly return since November 2003. Traders utilizing the Direxion Daily Semiconductor Bull 3X Shares (NYSE: SOXL) and Direxion Daily Semiconductor Bear 3X Shares (NYSE: SOXS) have faced extreme volatility in the market. This information can be found on Benzinga.com.
